query:
UPDATE users
        SET
            profile_id = COALESCE($3, profile_id),
            title = COALESCE($4, title),
            status = COALESCE(CAST($5::text as user_status), status),
            direct_manager_id = COALESCE($6, direct_manager_id),
            updated_at = NOW()
        WHERE id = $1 AND org_id = $2
        RETURNING id, updated_at
